texto: Its like reproaching someone who has no ear for music because he's bored at a symphony concert. Is it fair to blame me because you ascribed to me qualities that I hadn't got? I never tried to deceive you by pretending I was anything I wasn't. I was just pretty and gay. You don't ask for a pearl necklace or a sable coat at a booth in a fair
autor: you ask for a tin trumpet and a toy balloon.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you ask for a tin trumpet and a toy balloon.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Its like reproaching someone who has no ear for music because he's bored at a symphony concert. I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, w-somerset-maugham, because pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
